active.title: These incidents are still affecting this section right now.
active.description: Anything not fully closed out yet remains visible in this section's current operational history.

scheduled.title: Planned maintenance windows for this section appear here in advance.
scheduled.description: Scheduled quiet windows still belong to this section's history, but they are not treated as failures.

resolved.title: Finished incidents settle into this section's historical archive.
resolved.description: These entries remain useful as a browsable trail and a gateway to deeper incident details.

empty.active: There are no active incidents affecting this section right now.
empty.scheduled: There is no upcoming maintenance scheduled for this section.
empty.resolved: There are no resolved incidents to revisit for this section yet.
